intent: Four fixes for Learning Paths: (1) remove SVG roadmap/map visualization from detail page in favor of list view; (2) constrain card widths on listing page; (3) provision learning-path-covers storage bucket; (4) fix dialog scrollbars from gradient preset ring overflow.

findings.title: learning-path-covers INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE policies lack per-user ownership guard
findings.suggested_fix: Adopt folder structure {userId}/{pathId}.jpg with owner checks matching other buckets' pattern, or gate INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE behind a path-ownership check via subquery to learning_paths table.
findings.why_it_matters: Any authenticated user can overwrite or delete any other user's path cover images. While path covers are non-sensitive metadata images, this breaks data integrity and the principle of least privilege that the other 6 buckets follow.
evidence: INSERT policy (line 256) checks only bucket_id and auth.role(), no user ownership
UPDATE policy (line 262) checks only bucket_id, no user ownership
DELETE policy (line 269) checks only bucket_id, no user ownership
Other buckets use (storage.foldername(name))[1] = auth.uid()::text for ownership

findings.title: Missing test assertions for list-only view after roadmap removal
findings.suggested_fix: Add assertions for 'Courses' heading and '{N} of {M} completed' progress summary text. Add negative assertion that no map/toggle UI is rendered.
findings.why_it_matters: The plan's Unit 5 specifies tests should 'add list-only assertions' and 'remove map view assertions'. Only the TrailMap mock was removed; no new assertions verify the list-only layout, the 'Courses' heading, or the completion count. This leaves the removed-roadmap behavior untested against regressions.
evidence: Plan Unit 5 says: 'add list-only assertions' and 'remove map view assertions'
Only the TrailMap vi.mock was removed (lines 77-79 deleted), no new assertions added

findings.title: SQL header comment was inaccurate about DELETE policy scope
findings.suggested_fix: Updated header comment to clarify: DELETE policy omitted for user-owned buckets; learning-path-covers public bucket includes a DELETE policy.
findings.why_it_matters: The general comment said 'DELETE policy omitted intentionally' but the learning-path-covers section adds a DELETE policy. This could confuse future maintainers about whether the DELETE policy was intentional or accidental.
evidence: Line 41 previously: 'DELETE policy omitted intentionally — files are overwritten via upsert.'
Lines 267-271 add a DELETE policy for learning-path-covers

requirements_completeness.detail: RoadmapMapView, RoadmapViewToggle, and TrailMap deleted. viewMode state removed. Always renders RoadmapListView.
'Your Roadmap' heading replaced with 'Courses' + progress summary line.
max-w-[380px] mx-auto wrappers added to all 4 grid containers.
learning-path-covers bucket added to storage-setup.sql with public:true and RLS policies.
overflow-hidden added to gradient grid, ring-offset-2 reduced to ring-offset-1.

residual_risks: Authenticated users can overwrite each other's path cover images (F1)
testing_gaps: No assertions for list-only layout after roadmap removal (F2)
No unit test coverage for path cover upload with the new bucket
applied_fixes: F3: Updated SQL header comment to accurately describe DELETE policy scope
deployment_notes: Run storage-setup.sql against Supabase project to create learning-path-covers bucket before deploying
